def no_of_subsequences(arr, k):
    n = len(arr)
    count = 0
    # Generate all combinations
    for i in range(n):
        for j in range(i+1, n+1):
            # This is combinations of elements from i to j-1

            product = 1
            for x in subsequence:
                product *= x
            if product < k:
                count += 1
    return count
